next_steps: Measure serum TSH, free T4, and T3 levels
Order CSF for autoimmune encephalitis panel (anti-NMDA receptor antibodies)
Perform thyroid ultrasound with Doppler flow
Continue supportive care with careful monitoring for further seizures
Consider 24-hour video EEG monitoring to rule out subclinical status epilepticus
Evaluate for autonomic instability and potential for thyroid storm
